title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.372 - Chief Jerry Buehne Memorial Road designated in St. Louis County
text:
227.372.  Chief Jerry Buehne Memorial Road designated in St. Louis County. — The portion of Missouri Highway 30 in St. Louis County from the intersection of Highway P northeast to the St. Louis city limits shall be designated the "Chief Jerry Buehne Memorial Road".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs commemorating this portion of highway.  Costs for the designation shall be paid for by private funds raised for such purpose.
(L. 2005 S.B. 233)
